en: TO THE CHOIRMASTER. A PSALM OF DAVID. A SONG. Praise is due to you, O God, in Zion, and to you shall vows be performed.
zh: 神啊！在錫安城裡， 人們都在等候要頌讚你， 他們也要向你償還所許的願。

en: O you who hears prayer, to you shall all flesh come.
zh: 聽禱告的主啊！ 所有的人都要到你面前來。

en: When iniquities prevail against me, you atone for our transgressions.
zh: 罪孽勝過了我， 但我們的過犯，你都必赦免。

en: Blessed is the one you choose and bring near, to dwell in your courts! We shall be satisfied with the goodness of your house, the holiness of your temple!
zh: 你所揀選，使他親近你， 可以住在你院子中的人，是有福的！ 願我們因你的居所，就是你聖殿的美福心滿意足。

en: By awesome deeds you answer us with righteousness, O God of our salvation, the hope of all the ends of the earth and of the farthest seas;
zh: 拯救我們的 神啊！ 你必充滿威嚴，按公義應允我們； 你本是一切地極和海洋遠處的人所倚靠的。

en: the one who by his strength established the mountains, being girded with might;
zh: 你以大能束腰， 用自己的力量堅立眾山。

en: who stills the roaring of the seas, the roaring of their waves, the tumult of the peoples,
zh: 你平息了海洋的洪濤和澎湃的巨浪， 以及萬民的喧嘩。

en: so that those who dwell at the ends of the earth are in awe at your signs. You make the going out of the morning and the evening to shout for joy.
zh: 因此，住在地極的人都因你的神蹟起了敬畏的心； 你使日出和日落之地的人都歡呼歌唱。

en: You visit the earth and water it; you greatly enrich it; the river of God is full of water; you provide their grain, for so you have prepared it.
zh: 你眷顧大地，普降甘霖， 使地甚為肥沃； 神的河滿了水， 好為人預備五穀； 你就這樣預備了大地。

en: You water its furrows abundantly, settling its ridges, softening it with showers, and blessing its growth.
zh: 你灌溉地的犁溝，潤平犁脊， 又降雨露使地鬆軟， 並且賜福給地上所生長的。

en: You crown the year with your bounty; your wagon tracks overflow with abundance.
zh: 你以恩典為年歲的冠冕， 你的路徑都滴下脂油，

en: The pastures of the wilderness overflow, the hills gird themselves with joy,
zh: 滴在曠野的草場上； 群山以歡樂束腰，

en: the meadows clothe themselves with flocks, the valleys deck themselves with grain, they shout and sing together for joy.
zh: 牧場以羊群為衣， 山谷都蓋滿了五穀； 這一切都歡呼歌唱。
